chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-242 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.6620/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Petitioner Syed Yasir Ali Shah, present in-person ************** Petitioner Syed Yasir Ali Shah, bearing CNIC No.45504-0173082- 7, is present and does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed, along with the listed application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
